title: Thane, Maharashtra — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Thane is a city in Maharashtra with a population of 1,900,000. A rapidly growing satellite city of Mumbai, known for its lakes, green spaces, and as a major residential and commercial hub.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
